demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult daughter staying overnight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've been getting more and more breathless over the years, but tonight I can't catch my breath at all and I just coughed up some pink spit.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The breathlessness has become much worse over the last couple of days and now she can't breathe even sitting still, and tonight she coughed up blood-tinged spit — her daughter is very worried.

symptom_narrative.onset: breathlessness has crept up slowly over many years; it got dramatically worse over the past two days and is severe tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: years of gradual change, sharply worse in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: can't catch her breath; feels like she is drowning when she lies down; had a coughing fit tonight and brought up pink, blood-tinged spit
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — she has to stop after a few words to breathe
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant tonight and worse when lying flat; she is propped up on several pillows
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat and any exertion make it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very tired and washed out; feels her heart racing and fluttering irregularly over the last few days; ankles a bit puffy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: has felt breathless on exertion for a long time but never like this and never coughed up blood before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can barely move around the room tonight without stopping to breathe

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: had rheumatic fever as a child
past_medical_history.how_managed: recalls being unwell and treated for it as a child; no recent heart follow-up mentioned

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent bad sore throats as a child

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a water tablet she takes long term

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adult daughter is present tonight and staying over to keep an eye on her

objective_data_offered.value: 92% on a fingertip oximeter, breathing normal room air
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home fingertip oximeter; she is restless and breathing hard, which can affect the reading

objective_data_offered.value: daughter's smartwatch shows her pulse jumping around 110-120 and it looks irregular
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wearable, not a diagnostic ECG; rhythm interpretation is not reliable from a watch

objective_data_offered.value: sitting bolt upright leaning forward, visibly working hard to breathe and pausing mid-sentence; reddish-purple flushing across both cheeks
coughed up a small amount of pink, blood-tinged spit tonight after a coughing fit
several pillows stacked on the bed so she can sleep propped up
